title: ononis diffusa var. distantiflora
intro: Ononis diffusa var. distantiflora, also known as spreading restharrow, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ononis diffusa var. distantiflora include its use in treating digestive issues and its potential in reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
